scripts.test: bun fetch:fixtures && bun build:local && bun test:parser && bun test:codegen && bun test:analyzer && bun test:sourcemap

scripts.gen:wasm: zig build gen-parser-decoder && zig build gen-codegen-encoder && cp ./zig-out/bin/yuku-parser.wasm ./zig-out/decode.js ./npm/yuku-parser-wasm/ && cp ./npm/yuku-parser/index.d.ts ./npm/yuku-parser/walk.js ./npm/yuku-parser-wasm/ && cp ./zig-out/bin/yuku-codegen.wasm ./zig-out/encode.js ./npm/yuku-codegen-wasm/
